name: Carmel Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dry instant butterscotch pudding mix
1 can (8 oz) crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the thawed whipped topping, butterscotch pudding, and crushed pineapple with its juice.
2. Add diced apples, roasted nuts, and marshmallows to the mixture.
3. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
